note: LLM gateways / routers / aggregators (one API for many models). 'EU' = can the request actually be kept in the EU: EU-native (inference routed in-EU by design) > EU option (EU endpoint/region available, often enterprise; inference EU only if you pick EU models) > Self-host in EU (OSS — run it on your own EU infra) > Logs-only (only logs/metadata are EU-resident) > No. Most are US-HQ (US CLOUD Act applies regardless of server location). Researched 2026-06 from each product's own docs/pricing; re-verified 2026-07-22 against the same first-party sources (fields that could not be re-confirmed keep the 2026-06 values and are flagged in notes).

gateways.name: EUrouter
gateways.eu_detail: api.eurouter.ai — routes actual inference through EU/EEA providers by default; optional country pinning (DE/FR), eu_owned flag, ZDR. The most EU-native router.
gateways.notes: Closed-source but small/new; EU residency is the core product.

gateways.name: Cortecs
gateways.eu_detail: 'Europe's LLM router' — routes only to models hosted within the EU; guarantees data never leaves Europe, incl. for proprietary models (via EU-resident deployment). Genuine EU inference routing.
gateways.pricing: Usage + flat 5% service fee (no base-price markup)
gateways.notes: Sovereignty-first EU router; 150+ EU-hosted endpoints.

gateways.name: Orq.ai
gateways.eu_detail: EU-hosted (Amsterdam); AI Router has a Location filter — set to Europe to restrict the pool to EU-hosted models. Genuine EU inference routing when set.
gateways.notes: Full GenAI platform; SOC2/GDPR/EU-AI-Act; 400+ models / 28+ providers.

gateways.name: OpenRouter
gateways.eu_detail: eu.openrouter.ai (enterprise) keeps prompts+completions entirely in the EU, EU-eligible providers only. Standard tier has no EU residency. All tiers get ZDR + provider routing controls.
gateways.notes: Largest model market; strongest true-EU-inference guarantee but enterprise-gated.

gateways.name: Requesty
gateways.eu_detail: router.eu.requesty.ai (Frankfurt, AWS eu-central-1): its own processing/logs stay in EU; inference stays in EU only if you pick EU model deployments.
gateways.notes: Dedicated EU subdomain endpoint; 600+ models.

gateways.name: Eden AI
gateways.eu_detail: French company; dedicated EU endpoint + DPA + ZDR keeps data in Europe. Firmer on data residency than a hard EU-only-inference guarantee for all models.
gateways.notes: Most mature EU-HQ option; multimodal (500+ models incl. OCR/speech/vision).

gateways.name: Pydantic AI Gateway
gateways.eu_detail: gateway-eu.pydantic.dev EU proxy edge + Logfire EU region for logs/telemetry. EU edge routing yes; upstream model still runs where the provider hosts it.
gateways.pricing: BYOK free; 5% markup (Personal/Team) / 3% (Growth) on managed inference
gateways.notes: Now lives inside Pydantic Logfire; OSS standalone repo archived.

gateways.name: IBM watsonx.ai
gateways.eu_detail: Genuine EU inference regions: Frankfurt (eu-de) and London (eu-gb) endpoints. Built-in OpenAI-compatible model gateway to Granite + third-party providers (preview).
gateways.notes: Full enterprise studio; real EU regions + on-prem. 2026-07-22 re-check blocked (ibm.com 403) — values from 2026-06.

gateways.name: Kilo Code
gateways.eu_detail: No first-party EU endpoint; EU via official Inceptron partnership (kilo.ai/eu, EU infra) or third-party EUrouter. Single global gateway otherwise.
gateways.notes: Coding agent + gateway; EU via provider selection.

gateways.name: Portkey
gateways.eu_detail: OSS gateway self-hostable in your EU VPC; managed regional residency (US/EU/India) is enterprise (control plane stays global). Route to EU providers.
gateways.pricing: OSS free; SaaS Developer free (10k logs/mo) / Production $49/mo (100k logs) / Enterprise
gateways.notes: Runs locally; 1,600+ models / 250+ providers; 50+ guardrails; Gateway 2.0 merging enterprise gateway into OSS.

gateways.name: LiteLLM
gateways.eu_detail: Self-host anywhere; region_name='eu' routing pins inference to EU-tagged provider deployments. No managed EU SaaS endpoint.
gateways.notes: Most-adopted OSS proxy; 100+ providers; region/load-balancing/guardrails.

gateways.name: Helicone
gateways.eu_detail: Managed offers US/EU data region for logs/storage only (not inference egress). Self-host the Rust gateway in EU for full control.
gateways.notes: Observability-first; lightweight Rust router; standalone ai-gateway repo idle since 2025-11 (obs core active).

gateways.name: Kong AI Gateway
gateways.eu_detail: Runs entirely in your own infra; residency = where you deploy + which provider region you point at. No Kong-hosted inference.
gateways.notes: AI plugins on Kong; semantic routing/caching/guardrails.

gateways.name: Bifrost (Maxim)
gateways.eu_detail: Self-host in an EU region/VPC for residency; no Maxim-operated EU inference endpoint.
gateways.notes: Fast Go gateway; ~µs overhead; 1000+ models.

gateways.name: LangDB
gateways.eu_detail: No EU endpoint advertised; self-host the Rust gateway on your own EU infra.
gateways.notes: Fast Rust gateway; OSS repo transferred to vllora/vllora and repositioned as 'Debug your AI agents' (ELv2). langdb.ai pricing unverifiable 2026-07-22 (403) — pricing from 2026-06.

gateways.name: TrueFoundry
gateways.eu_detail: Regional gateway data planes deployable in EU; region-locked routing fails closed outside EU for both inference and logs (depends on configured EU backend).
gateways.notes: Strong region-locked data-residency story; proprietary.

gateways.name: Braintrust
gateways.eu_detail: EU data-plane residency for eval/observability logs on Enterprise; not inference routing. OSS proxy self-deployable to edge/Lambda.
gateways.notes: Eval/observability-first; auto-logs every call as a trace.

gateways.name: llmgateway.io (theopenco)
gateways.eu_detail: OSS unified-API gateway; deploy on your own EU infra. Hosted option exists.
gateways.pricing: BYOK free; hosted credits +5% flat fee; self-host free (AGPL-3.0); Enterprise custom
gateways.notes: Newer OSS alternative to Eden AI / Vercel / Cloudflare gateways.

gateways.name: Arch / Plano (Katanemo)
gateways.eu_detail: Self-host the Envoy-based proxy in EU; no managed EU endpoint.
gateways.notes: AI-native Envoy edge proxy; semantic routing + guardrails (renamed Arch→Plano).

gateways.name: Envoy AI Gateway
gateways.eu_detail: Kubernetes-native; run your cluster in the EU. No managed EU endpoint.
gateways.notes: CNCF project (Tetrate+Bloomberg); production-ready v1.0; 16 providers.

gateways.name: Vercel AI Gateway
gateways.eu_detail: Single global endpoint ai-gateway.vercel.sh; no EU region routing (open feature request). ZDR = retention, not residency.
gateways.pricing: Passthrough, 0% markup (incl. BYOK); free tier (model subset, rate-limited); paid add-ons (team ZDR / provider allowlist $0.10/1k req, custom reporting)
gateways.notes: Zero markup, strong fallbacks/BYOK; no EU residency.

gateways.name: Cloudflare AI Gateway
gateways.eu_detail: Global edge proxy; incompatible with Cloudflare's own Regional Services. Only log metadata can be EU-pinned; inference depends on upstream provider.
gateways.notes: Easiest to adopt; weakest EU-residency story.

gateways.name: Martian
gateways.eu_detail: No managed EU residency; enterprise VPC deployment could run in an EU cloud region.
gateways.notes: Pioneer quality/cost per-prompt 'model router'. 2026-07-22: homepage repositioned as AI-interpretability research lab; pricing page 404 and route.withmartian.com unreachable — pricing/self-host values stale (from 2026-06).

gateways.name: RouteLLM
gateways.eu_detail: Python library; runs wherever you host it, dispatches via LiteLLM to your chosen (EU) provider.
gateways.notes: Strong/weak two-model cost router; ~85% cost cut research; repo inactive since Aug 2024.

gateways.name: OptiLLM
gateways.eu_detail: Self-hosted OpenAI-compatible proxy; residency depends on your deploy + backend.
gateways.notes: Test-time accuracy optimizer (CoT/MoA/MCTS), not a billing gateway.

gateways.name: New API / One API family
gateways.eu_detail: Self-host (Docker/binary) anywhere incl. EU; key-management + redistribution. Inference egress per configured channel.
gateways.notes: one-api lineage (one-api→new-api/one-hub→done-hub); key-mgmt gateways, not semantic routers; homepage now newapi.ai.

gateways.name: GPTRouter
gateways.eu_detail: Self-host (Docker) in EU; ~6 providers.
gateways.notes: Appears abandoned (no commits since Apr 2024).

gateways.name: GPUStack
gateways.eu_detail: You run it on your own GPUs/servers (EU if you choose). Serves your own models, not a third-party router.
gateways.notes: GPU-cluster + model-serving orchestrator (not a multi-provider router).

gateways.name: Glama
gateways.eu_detail: 'Globally distributed', no EU residency claim. OSS 'lightport' core self-hostable in EU.
gateways.notes: Gateway tied to an MCP server registry/inspector.

gateways.name: Keywords AI (Respan)
gateways.eu_detail: Compliance certs (GDPR/SOC2/ISO) but no EU region endpoint for inference; self-host is enterprise-only.
gateways.notes: Gateway + observability + prompt mgmt + evals (rebranded Keywords AI→Respan).

gateways.name: AIMLAPI
gateways.eu_detail: EU-domiciled (Estonia) but makes no EU-routing/residency claim; single global endpoint.
gateways.notes: 1000+ models reseller; EU relevance is corporate only.

gateways.name: APIpie
gateways.eu_detail: No EU residency claim.
gateways.notes: 700+ LLMs + integrated web search & chat memory; failover.

gateways.name: AnannasAI
gateways.eu_detail: No EU residency claim.
gateways.notes: Small aggregator (~500 models); fallback + observability + BYOK. Site unreachable (HTTP 522) at 2026-07-22 re-check — values from 2026-06.

gateways.name: nano-gpt
gateways.eu_detail: No EU residency; privacy via TEE 'Private Mode' + crypto/no-account, not residency.
gateways.notes: Privacy/crypto pay-per-prompt aggregator; huge multimodal catalog; 5% surcharge for provider pinning and for BYOK.

gateways.name: Unify
gateways.eu_detail: Router product shut down; pivoted to an AI-agent ('droids') SaaS.
gateways.notes: Former benchmark-driven router — no longer a gateway product.
